name: env-to-ssm
description: CLI tool to push .env variables to AWS SSM Parameter Store

scripts.push:dev: npx tsx src/index.ts --service MY-SERVICE --env dev --file .env.dev --profile dev
scripts.push:staging: npx tsx src/index.ts --service MY-SERVICE --env staging --file .env.staging  --profile staging
scripts.push:prod: npx tsx src/index.ts --service MY-SERVICE --env prod --file .env.prod --profile prod
